scripts.backendRubyOnRails: cd backendRubyOnRails && concurrently --names "Api_gateway,Categories,Games,Auth,Cart,Order" --prefix-colors "red,yellow,blue,white,green,cyan" "cd api_gateway && rails server" "cd categories && rails server" "cd games && rails server" "cd auth && rails server" "cd cart && rails server" "cd orders && wsl bash -lc 'rails server'"
scripts.backendGo: cd backendGo && concurrently --names "Api_gateway,Games,Library,Reviews" --prefix-colors "red,blue,yellow,green" "cd api_gateway && air " "cd games && air" "cd library && air" "cd reviews && air"
scripts.backend: npx concurrently --names "Rails,Go,Chat" --prefix-colors "red,yellow,blue" "npm run backendRubyOnRails" "npm run backendGo" "npm run backendChat"
